0.text: Significant decrease in the large consolidation area in the right lung from the previous CT examination

1.text: Consolidation area in the lower lobe superior and posterobasal segments of the right lung with air bronchograms and surrounding ground glass opacity

2.text: Ectasia in the bronchial structures at the level of the lower lobe superior and posterobasal segments of the right lung

3.text: Subcentimeter pleural effusion in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Linear fibroatelectatic changes in the lower lobe posterobasal and inferior lingular segments of the left lung

5.text: Mild emphysematous changes in both lungs
